from notebookutils import mssparkutils
import re
import csv
import io
from datetime import datetime

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace '{workspace}'")

mpesc_base_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"
FULL_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-SPREADSHEET/EXTRACT/CaseNote.csv"

NULL_GUID = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"

# Step 1: Read full file as binary to avoid line-split issues
print("Step 1: Reading file...")
binary_rdd = spark.sparkContext.binaryFiles(FULL_PATH)
raw_bytes = binary_rdd.collect()[0][1]
raw_content = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')
print(f"  Characters read: {len(raw_content)}")

# Step 2: Parse properly with csv.reader (handles quoted newlines)
print("Step 2: Parsing CSV...")
rows = list(csv.reader(io.StringIO(raw_content)))
print(f"  Rows parsed (inc header): {len(rows)}")

header = rows[0]
comment_idx = header.index("comment")
date_idx = header.index("createdAt")
author_idx = header.index("authorId")

# Step 3: Fix data issues
print("Step 3: Fixing dates, authorIds, quoting comments...")
output = io.StringIO()
writer = csv.writer(output, quoting=csv.QUOTE_MINIMAL, lineterminator='\n')
writer.writerow(header)

fixed_dates = 0
fixed_guids = 0

for i, row in enumerate(rows[1:], 1):
    # Fix date
    original_date = row[date_idx]
    row[date_idx] = fix_date(original_date)
    if row[date_idx] != original_date.strip():
        fixed_dates += 1

    # Fix authorId
    original_author = row[author_idx]
    row[author_idx] = fix_guid(original_author)
    if row[author_idx] != original_author.strip():
        fixed_guids += 1
        print(f"  Row {i}: fixed authorId '{original_author}' -> '{row[author_idx]}'")

    writer.writerow(row)

print(f"  Dates fixed: {fixed_dates}")
print(f"  AuthorIds fixed: {fixed_guids}")

from notebookutils import mssparkutils
import csv
import io
from datetime import datetime

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace '{workspace}'")

mpesc_base_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"
FULL_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-SPREADSHEET/EXTRACT/CaseNote.csv"

binary_rdd = spark.sparkContext.binaryFiles(FULL_PATH)
raw_bytes = binary_rdd.collect()[0][1]
raw_content = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')

rows = list(csv.reader(io.StringIO(raw_content)))
header = rows[0]
date_idx = header.index("createdAt")

output = io.StringIO()
writer = csv.writer(output, quoting=csv.QUOTE_MINIMAL, lineterminator='\n')
writer.writerow(header)

for row in rows[1:]:
    val = row[date_idx].strip()
    # Strip " 00:00:00" time portion
    if ' ' in val:
        val = val.split(' ')[0]
    row[date_idx] = val
    writer.writerow(row)

mssparkutils.fs.put(FULL_PATH, output.getvalue(), overwrite=True)
print(f"Done. {len(rows)-1} rows written. Dates stripped to YYYY-MM-DD.")

print("Step 4: Writing file back...")
mssparkutils.fs.put(FULL_PATH, output.getvalue(), overwrite=True)
print(f"Done. {len(rows)-1} rows written.")
